name: Patient 13
history: Death of close aunt (mother figure). Did not fulfill aunt's last request or attend death. Pattern of prioritizing others' needs over own.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I must always put others first to be a good person.
intermediate_belief_depression: I failed my aunt; I don't deserve happiness.
situation: On way to movie, friend calls for emotional support; gives up movie to talk.
auto_thought: "My movie can wait. If I don't help, I'm selfish like when I failed my aunt."
behavior: Cancels plans, listens to friend for hour, feels secretly angry but doesn't show it.
